Combat sport events in 2024
ONE Fight Night 18: Gasanov vs. Oh
The poster for ONE Fight Night 18: Gasanov vs. Oh
PromotionONE Championship
DateJanuary 13, 2024 (2024-01-13)
VenueLumpinee Boxing Stadium
CityBangkok, Thailand
Event chronology
ONE Friday Fights 47: Suakim vs. Balyko ONE Fight Night 18: Gasanov vs. Oh ONE Friday Fights 48: Kongthoranee vs. Mazoriev

ONE Fight Night 18: Gasanov vs. Oh was a combat sport event produced by ONE Championship that took place on January 13, 2024, at Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand.[1]

Background

[edit]

A ONE Flyweight Kickboxing World Championship bout between current champion Superlek Kiatmuu9 and Elias Mahmoudi was expected to headline the event.[2] However, Mahmoudi withdrew from the bout due to rib injury.[3] Superlek was instead to face former three-divisions K-1 World Champion Takeru Segawa at ONE 165 on January 28.[4] As a results, a featherweight bout between Shamil Gasanov and Oh Ho-taek was promoted to main event status.[5]

A bantamweight Muay Thai bout between former ONE Bantamweight Champion John Lineker, who making his Muay Thai debut against Liam Harrison was scheduled for this event.[6] However, Harrison suffered a knee injury and the bout was scrapped.[7]

Results

[edit]
Fight card (Amazon Prime Video)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight Shamil Gasanov def. Oh Ho-taek Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Muay Thai Suablack Tor.Pran49 def. István Ștefan Kóródi Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Bantamweight Kwon Won-il def. Shinechagtga Zoltsetseg TKO (elbows) 2 2:40
Lightweight Muay Thai Rungrawee Sitsongpeenong def. Shakir Al-Tekreeti TKO (elbow and knee) 2 1:44
Bantamweight Artem Belakh def. Enkh-Orgil Baatarkhuu TKO (knee and punches) 2 4:55
Lightweight Muay Thai Liam Nolan def. Ali Aliev Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Heavyweight Kang Ji-won def. Mikhail Jamal Abdul-Latif TKO (knee and punches) 2 4:09
Light Heavyweight Kickboxing Beybulat Isaev def. Yuri Farcaș Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Bantamweight Ibragim Dauev def. Mark Abelardo Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00

[8]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.[9]

  • Performance of the Night: Kwon Won-il and Rungrawee Sitsongpeenong
